notes: Audit run against the PR build served via vite preview (the production Pages deploy still reflects pre-PR code).
Previous audit (2026-04-20 first run) omitted performance; this is the full four-category result.
Accessibility rose 96 → 100 after adding the <main> landmark in App.tsx.
Performance 100 is largely due to lazy-splitting TerminalDisplay + ShareCard + locales; the initial JS payload is 145.66 kB gzipped (34 kB under the 180 kB T67 budget).
Raw report.html + report.json are gitignored; re-run `npx lighthouse ...` to regenerate.
